comment_text.sn22.29:1.2: This discourse and the next parallel SN 14.35–6.

root_text.sn22.29:1.2: “Yo, bhikkhave, rūpaṁ abhinandati, dukkhaṁ so abhinandati.
root_text.sn22.29:1.3: Yo dukkhaṁ abhinandati, ‘aparimutto so dukkhasmā’ti vadāmi.
root_text.sn22.29:1.7: yo viññāṇaṁ abhinandati, dukkhaṁ so abhinandati.
root_text.sn22.29:1.8: Yo dukkhaṁ abhinandati, ‘aparimutto so dukkhasmā’ti vadāmi.
root_text.sn22.29:1.9: Yo ca kho, bhikkhave, rūpaṁ nābhinandati, dukkhaṁ so nābhinandati.
root_text.sn22.29:1.10: Yo dukkhaṁ nābhinandati, ‘parimutto so dukkhasmā’ti vadāmi.
root_text.sn22.29:1.14: yo viññāṇaṁ nābhinandati, dukkhaṁ so nābhinandati.
root_text.sn22.29:1.15: Yo dukkhaṁ nābhinandati, ‘parimutto so dukkhasmā’ti vadāmī”ti.

translation_text.sn22.29:1.2: “Mendicants, if you take pleasure in form, you take pleasure in suffering.
translation_text.sn22.29:1.3: If you take pleasure in suffering, you’re not free from suffering, I say.
translation_text.sn22.29:1.4: If you take pleasure in feeling …
translation_text.sn22.29:1.7: consciousness, you take pleasure in suffering.
translation_text.sn22.29:1.8: If you take pleasure in suffering, you’re not free from suffering, I say.
translation_text.sn22.29:1.9: If you don’t take pleasure in form, you don’t take pleasure in suffering.
translation_text.sn22.29:1.10: If you don’t take pleasure in suffering, you’re free from suffering, I say.
translation_text.sn22.29:1.11: If you don’t take pleasure in feeling …
translation_text.sn22.29:1.14: consciousness, you don’t take pleasure in suffering.
translation_text.sn22.29:1.15: If you don’t take pleasure in suffering, you’re free from suffering, I say.”
